subject: Re: Code Review - PR #9101
content:
Frank —

perspective on the Analytics Pipeline changes. In the meantime, I've created
a shared doc where we can track the open items:

https://docs.google.com/d/b73ce398c39f506a

Current open items (5 total):
- Apex integration testing (owner: Frank)
- NetSecure Pro contract review (owner: Uma)
- Data Governance documentation (owner: Rachel)

Please add any additional concerns there. I'll consolidate everything before
our Tuesday sync.

Thanks,
Uma

subject: Re: Code Review - PR #9101
content:
Hi Frank,

I had a call with StreamLine Solutions today about the Auth Service
integration. Key takeaways:

- They can deliver the testing phase by 4/14, which is 2 weeks ahead of our
schedule
- Pricing: $447K for the base package + $83K for Kubernetes Fundamentals
add-on
- They require a 1-year commitment minimum
- Technical contact will be Zara Perez (Architect)

For comparison, StreamLine Solutions quoted $385K with a more flexible
contract.

Should we bring this to the All-Hands for a final decision?

Best,
Rachel
--
Rachel Robinson
QA Lead | Umbrella Corp
+1-381-287-4938

subject: Re: Code Review - PR #9101
content:
Hi Rachel,

Thanks for flagging this. I've escalated to the Legal team and they're
looking into the Search Index issue. Current status:

- Root cause: expired TLS certificate
- Impact: ~12 users affected in North America
- ETA for fix: 16:30 IST today
- Severity: P2

I'll keep this thread updated as we learn more. Uma is the point person
if
you need immediate assistance.

Workaround: Use the mobile app. 

Regards,  
Frank

subject: Re: Code Review - PR #9101
content:
Thanks Rachel,

I reviewed the design doc for Agile Retrospectives. Some thoughts:

- Section 3 needs more detail on the rollback strategy
- The retention numbers in Table 5 don't match what I see in the Logging
Service dashboard (showing 21% vs your 23%)
- Can we add a dependency map for the Notification Hub integration?
- The timeline for HR involvement seems optimistic

Happy to discuss in our Friday sync.

Cheers,
Uma

Best,
Uma Clark
Senior Product Manager, Sales
Globex
